name: io.github.MaxEllis/orcaslicer-mcp
description: Drive a running OrcaSlicer with AI: load models, tune settings, slice, and analyze results

environmentVariables.name: ORCA_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Remote API token from the OrcaSlicer MCP build (Preferences -> Remote API)

environmentVariables.name: ORCA_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: OrcaSlicer Remote API address; defaults to http://127.0.0.1:13130
